records.ety: [OE. holihoc; holi holy + hoc mallow, AS. hoc; cf. W. hocys mallows, hocys bendigaid hollyhock, lit., blessed mallow. Prob. so named because brought from the Holy Land. See Holy.]

defs: A species of Althæa (Althæa rosea), bearing flowers of various colors; -- called also rose mallow.
notes: Rose mallow is listed as a variety of Hibiscus, not Hollyhock in several Web pages. Name change???
